calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2016 Off Calendar

Motion To Request Default Prove Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Dec-31-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Robert Cohen, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Wells Fargo Bank, National Association,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Kutay Derin Kugay aka Kutay D Kugay, individually and dba 78 Productions,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $53,839.67
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $0
Total Judgment in the amount of $53,839.67

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Continued To Feb-10-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
